grant_title: North to Shore (N2S) Community Arts Program Grant
geographic_restrictions: City of Newark, New Jersey (Northeast US)
project_area: Live performances, exhibitions, and arts and cultural programming for the North to Shore Festival Newark
demographic_requirements: No explicit demographic requirements; open to all eligible applicants.
eligibility_summary: Open to artists, collectives, and community organizations in Newark, NJ, to support arts and cultural programming for the North to Shore Festival (June 13-27, 2026). Funding ranges from $1,000 to $5,000.
